MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. Defendant, Glinda M. Green, appeared in pro per. There being no appearance by Counsel for the Plaintiff, Epstein Mark, Esq. or Plaintiff, Clara Haynes, the Court ordered the matter off calendar.
